reviews.review_title: I really wanted this game to be great
reviews.review_description:
I was looking forward for quite sometime to this game. Way too many bugs/jank right away…. and all throughout the game. No way to roll back if you get stuck, and having to start all over when you are hours in is disheartening. I want to enjoy a game and have fun, but this game took so much out of me trying to get it to work, I really dont want to finish it. I currently cannot finish anyway. I am near the end with and no way to progress due to a game breaking bug. I can understand releasing something with a few issues, but HOW could this have been released in this state?

** I will update ratings based on patches

Edit:

I have upgraded my review to a 5 star, as it is really a great game… 
A rough start releasing a game in a buggy state really hurts the devs, but it worked out. This game really is amazing, and it’s too bad we wont see anything like this again in the future… maybe I shouldnt have complained so quickly

Update 2: I'm glad they did not abandone the game, because after the last update finally it is bug free and possible to complete the game. I advise anyone to buy it because this is one of the best single player narrative game on VR. If only it would have launched in this state it would not have hurt it's reputation, because it would have really deserved massive sales. Thanks again for not abandoning and fixing it.


Uodate: I was 2 kind with the 2 stars rating initially. I convinced myself to try and finish the game. When I got soft locked somewhere I decided to restart chapter. I also started to use several save states. I think I was able to battle most of the bugs and get close to the ending. But in the end I was defeated 😂 There is a part when I'm constantly being teleported on the rail line and not in the transport after a load screen. Doesn't matter how I restart, how I use may backup saves, unfortunately nothing saves this game. This is so unfortunate, because under the huge pile of bugs, there is a very good game hidden. But no one should sell a product in such state as this game is in... Spend your money on something else that ia actually playable and don't buy this! 

This game could be a masterpiece. The mechanics are working really well and I enjoyed playing this game very much.. Until a bug basically made it impossible to continue my progress, because a sequence fails to trigger. This is the first time I experience something like this in a game, and as I can see this is widespread. My only option would be the fully restart the game and hope that I don't get locked somewhere during my gameplay. It is so sad.
I won't give one star because I really enjoyed my playing time with this game, but no one should be selling a game when it is so unfinished. Or sell it as a beta test and notify buyers about it at least...
Uodate: devs I'm stuck at the same place a bafometart said in his review. It means maybe it is fixable. If you provide a patch the solves that bug and let me continue my game I will update my review

As many users have already pointed out, this game is unfortunately unfinished, and it shows. It looks fantastic, but the near-perfect immersion is constantly disrupted by minor and major graphical glitches. While the arm-waving isn't quite as annoying as in Stride, you still get tired of it after a while. The most significant flaw, however, is undoubtedly the object handling, as every movement is artificially lagged. This is most noticeable when using handguns, which consequently feel sluggish. Furthermore, it doesn't run completely smoothly and urgently needs a few more frames per second. It must be said, though, that Reach boasts beautiful visuals, excellent dialogue, and fast-paced, challenging, and addictive gameplay. You're reluctant to put your quest down because the parkour is so much fun. Unfortunately, Reach has now crashed on me three times, and I'm currently re-downloading it—after only about two hours of playtime. I sincerely hope that this game will be properly polished so that it can be called a masterpiece - because it is, just in its raw state.

Edit: Unfortunately, City Outskirt always starts without me on the train. I've re-downloaded the game, restarted the quest, and played through everything again: unfortunately, the train leaves before me, and I keep falling and dying.

Edit 2: It took a while, but the update is finally here and everything is working again. I'm thrilled and was finally able to finish Reach today. I still consider it a masterpiece that was unfortunately overlooked because of all the bugs. Thank you for fixing so much.

I was reluctant to try this due to the price and some of the reviews. However, I'm really impressed so far. I'm maybe 1.5 hours in and it's great. There are frame drops and I had a crash near the start but nothing terrible. Good graphics and atmospheric. The enemies put up a fight too. Which is rare in VR games.  Recommended.

Edit.

I had to give up fairly early on. The traversal is too complex - too many mechanics and not enough visual clues. I collected a 2nd upgrade and can't get back to the main path.

Edit.

Tried again. Got a little further but it's just too hard to navigate. It's the sort of game where you need a walkthrough open at the same time. Unplayable for me. Can't get a refund as I played beyond 2 hours.

Edit.
I preserved, got a little further and my save game was deleted. Total fail.

Here’s a clear, polite version for the developer:
 
In the VR game Reach, at the train station at the beginning of the City Outskirts chapter, I spawn directly on the tracks outside the train. Whenever I try to move, I fall off and die immediately, making it completely impossible to proceed with the game. I hope the developer can fix this bug.

developer_response.body:
Our latest patch from earlier this week should unlock this blocker for you! Once you've updated your app, please try restarting the chapter 'the first weakpoint' and play it through. You should find the issue resolved. 

Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR game on Quest
reviews.review_description: I’m amazed by how great the graphics and how fluid and fantastic the parkour feels. Great music, great world building, great story and lores. It’s definitely an AAA production and A MUST play on quest.

reviews.review_title: Nice to See Real Games Made for VR
reviews.review_description:
Updated Review: 
The bug I talked about in my initial review was fixed and I was able to finish the game. I appreciate that the developers are working to make the game the best it can be. It is nice to play a game in VR that has a narrative behind it and is not just a collection of mini games or an on rails shooter. With that said, I did experience a new bug where Atlas would yell "Rosa, the lift" every couple minutes for the rest of the game but at least that didn't stop me from progressing. Hopefully some lessons have been learned and I look forward to seeing what the developers do next.


Original Review:
I really wanted to like this game and for the most part I did, it looks great, the combat is serviceable and the climbing puzzles are challenging without being cheap. I just wish it ran better and didn't have so many bugs. Up until today I have been able to deal with the bugs but I got the monorail bug in the City Outskirts chapter that I have seen several other reviews mention. Reloading the chapter did not work, restarting the game did not work. The only option I have is to go back to the beginning of the previous chapter which I really don't want to do and even then there's no guarantee that I would not get the same bug when I got back to this spot. Very disappointing that after having put so many hours into the game it is now impossible for me to finish.

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you so much for re-reviewing the game after the patch update. We appreciate its a little frustrating, but we're happy you enjoyed the game! Feedback noted.

reviews.review_description: A lot of fun. A lot of adrenaline because  of the the heights. The underground world is a trip. Fantastic graphics.Would be cool if they did some kind of sequel or prequel.

BRILLIANT! Didn't expect this from the "promo" video. Absolutely fantastic. The game played without any problems and a great bonus it saves automatically, and very close to where you "died* so no long journeys to get back to where you were. Do yourself a favour and have a go. One of the best!

reviews.review_title: Game is great but also buggy
reviews.review_description: The combat is ok but the climbing mechanics and puzzles are great and these are the core of the game (best VR parkour/climbing game that I've played). The presentation and environment is also top-notch, and it reminds me of other high-profile games such as Assassin's Creed Nexus and Asgard's Wrath 2. The only thing holding this game back are the bugs. The majority of the bugs I can ignore, but it has bugs that can get you soft locked in some places (or at least it had when I last played some months ago). I got soft locked at the end of the game and couldn't progress, so I had to restart it. It pains me to not give 5 stars on this game since it can be such a fantastic experience when everything works, but I simply cannot give 5 stars to a game that can get you soft locked no matter how good the experience is. If you can get past this then this game is actually an amazing story-driven climbing puzzle (with some light combat), just make sure to always backup your saved data in previous locations so you can proceed if you get soft locked.

I absolutely regret falling for this game at this ridiculous price. It is an utter joke

The graphics are mediocre, and we’re constantly hitting loading doors just to enter new rooms, yet the frame rate still tanks constantly. The climbing is okay, and the puzzles are passable, but the combat is entirely devoid of emotion and could easily be scrapped.

Within mere hours, the bugs piled up into the dozens. If a patch was supposedly released, and the game is still this abysmal, the developers should be utterly ashamed—this shouldn't even pass for an Early Access title.

I was patient until I ran into a progression-blocking bug after a few hours, and that’s when I snapped. I am infuriated and disgusted by this hopelessly low quality and the developers' sheer greed. 

You ought to be ashamed of this mess, and I guarantee you won't fool me or countless others ever again.

Update:

I can't stand even five minutes in this game. It looks awful, and it also has constant frame drops. It's one of the worst builds I've ever seen on the Quest. The devs should be fined for pushing it out in such a state—it's a disgrace to all users.

DON'T BE FOOL, DON'T BUY THIS GAME

After the recent patch:
I would not believe you can be even worse than in my previous comment but after recent patch and you bragging about things you fixed I see literally NO IMPROVEMENT on OBVIOUS bugs and issues. You would have to pay me to make me play this pile of bugs.

developer_response.body: Hi there - we appreciate you taking the time to play the game after the latest patch. If you're still experiencing severe issues, we'd like to hear what they are! The latest fixes should have addressed the most common issues, so we'd like to help you if we can. Reach out on discord.gg/ndreams if you want to troubleshoot - Sean

reviews.review_description: Wow! What an incredible game. The graphics are stunning, the immersion is overwhelming in a good way, and since I am afraid of heights... yikes! At parts, the heights are way too realistic! I loved it. The voice acting was spot-on, the story unique and easy to get caught up in, and I think it was just challenging enough. From the very first part, how the "tutorial" is presented when you start the game, all the way through towards the pulse-inducing ending, I've got zero complaints and wish that I would have played this sooner! Highly recommended.

I'll be completely honest, do not buy this game!! It's almost unplayable; the parkour mechanics and aesthetics are the only redeeming qualities, and even those... it's ridiculous that in a VR game, you have to press buttons to pull yourself onto a platform or crouch through a low passage instead of doing it intuitively with body movements... then the shield deployment mechanics are very clunky at first until you get the hang of it, not fluid at all... the "Spider-Man" style green platform grappling doesn't work quite right either, being extremely frustrating at times... and searching for the health recovery device, which the game tells you is on your left shoulder when it's actually on the left chest in the 3D model; I only saw it by chance after spending a long time trying to grab it and only getting the bow instead... and don't even get me started on the amount of game-breaking bugs I've encountered, which don't just glitch you out of the map or launch you senselessly through the air... I haven't even been able to finish it because I reached a part where a conversation with the automaton is supposed to trigger to continue, and since it doesn't trigger, the compass told me to return to the bridge room. I don't know which bridge it means, but trying to return to one of the rooms with a bridge, I got trapped in a room where the only exit is an electrified wall with a beam that shouldn't be there, because I had already passed that section and disabled the sentinels and the beam so it wouldn't be electrified. Since I can't disable that beam again, I can't climb out, so it's game over for me. My first big disappointment in a VR game...

developer_response.body:
Updated response: we've just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players. This includes bug fixes and progression blockers. If you're willing to jump back in, we'd love to hear your thoughts after this patch! 

If you have continued issues, please message us on discord.gg/ndreams 

- 

Hi there, we're sorry to hear that you've had a frustrating time playing Reach. Please reach out to us on our Discord server - discord.gg/ndreams - and we can try to help you trouble shoot and collect more information on your specific issues! We're looking to patch the game to address player feedback again, so do reach out to us.

reviews.review_description: While playing this game, I encountered a lot of bugs. In one of the levels, I turned off a laser that was blocking my path. But if you enter the room next to it, the laser turns back on, and you can’t turn it off again—you have to restart the level. I’ve practically finished this game, and I’m incredibly tired of its monotony and poor optimization for the Quest 3 headset. When I had about an hour of gameplay left, the game threw another bug at me—it throws me off the train onto the tracks, and I keep falling and figuring out that I have to replay the entire chapter again. I don’t want this torture anymore. It’s a disgusting game with locations so monotonous they make you want to vomit, and the same enemies over and over. I watched the ending online and have no intention of playing this trash anymore—I’ve deleted it. 1/10—my worst purchase ever.

developer_response.body: Hey there, we really sorry to hear that you've had a frustrating time in Reach, especially after the latest patch update. If you're willing to retry the game in the future, please reach out to us on discord.gg/ndreams and we can try to help resolve some of the problems you've faced. We appreciate you taking the time to leave a review anyway.

reviews.review_description:
Overall it's a brilliant game despite its technical flaws.

Reach is like a dystopian Alice in Wonderland.  Once you’ve gone down the rabbit hole, the world nDreams has built for Reach is a fascinating and beautiful place. There were many times during the course of the game where I paused for a few moments just look around in awe. The parkour and bow combat are excellent.  The VR interactions all feel very natural and incredibly immersive. The art direction, animation, and voice acting are top notch. There's a lot of interesting and creative ideas packed into this game. Some of the most spectacular moments I've had in my decade of using VR were in Reach.

Some have criticized Reach for being "too short" and I strongly disagree. The length seems just right to tell the story and fully immerse the player without wearing out its welcome. It took me just over two weeks to complete it after starting over from the beginning after the third patch. (My attempts to play through the game on previous patches failed due to multiple soft locks.) I played for roughly an hour to an hour an a half most every day.  If you’re a binge gamer who plays for many hours a day Reach, (and almost every other VR game), may seem too short.

The only criticism I have with the game design is the introduction / tutorial.  It makes a really bad first impression and I wouldn't be surprised if people request refunds before completing this area. There's a silly and contrived plot twist roughly halfway through the introduction that’s a cheap trick on the player, especially considering that you are the main character. It’s a shame to start off such a fantastic game in this way.

Aside from the poor introduction this is still one of the best VR adventures I’ve ever played and ranks right up there with Batman, Asgard's Wrath 2, and Behemoth. One thing all these games have in common besides pushing the boundaries of VR, is that they were all incredibly glitchy even months after release. Unfortunately Reach is still very glitchy six months after its launch so I can’t in good conscience give it a five star rating yet. Maybe technical issues are just the nature of these cutting edge beasts. You can't expect a high performance sports car like a Lamborghini to have the reliability of a Honda Civic so it’s possible the same applies to these incredibly ambitious VR games. VR game development must be far more difficult than flat screen games because you’re not just dealing with controller input, you’re also tracking human beings moving freely in space while reading their gestures.

A list of issues I've encountered after the third patch:

* The frame rate occasionally stutters.

* The controller haptics seem applied almost at random. Some interactions that obviously should have haptics don’t.

* The run mode can get stuck in the "on" position. Until it unsticks you'll have to listen to your character's constant huffing and puffing from exerting herself. Even a tiny baby step after resting triggers her heavy breathing while it's stuck in this mode.  This is by far the most annoying glitch because it's a continual issue.

* After some scene transitions or quitting back to the main menu you fall to the floor from a few feet in the air because the game starts you in the air instead of on the ground.

* Character voice prompts can trigger after you've already performed the action you've been prompted to do. Occasionally a character will repeat their instructions over and over and no matter how quickly you comply with the orders you'll receive them multiple times.

* I had to start over at a checkpoint twice during combat.  Once when the bow glitched and wouldn’t select arrows properly and another time when I got trapped on the wrong side of a barrier and I couldn’t shoot enemies and they couldn’t shoot me.

If some, (or hopefully all), of these issues get resolved It’ll be a solid five star title.  As it is now I still highly recommend it to anyone looking for a really fantastic adventure in VR.

developer_response.body: Hi Jioxx, thanks for leaving such a detailed review! We appreciate you coming back to reach a third time and replaying it. We've noted all your feedback and will take this forward as a continue to work on improving Reach!

reviews.review_title: Why not promote it as Early Access?
reviews.review_description:
I found the courage to replay the game all the way from 'Stadium Grounds', the last chapter I had on the list. There were still three chapters left: Clash with a Titan, Save Atlas, and Chase Lithos. I have to say I enjoyed those much more, so I’m revising my initial low score.

I’d give it 4/5 stars if there were no bugs. Unfortunately, I encountered quite a few: arms deforming, body stucked, and I even remember a blank screen while loading The Workshop that required a restart. All these issues are frustrating, the game should probably be in Early Access at a lower price until everything is fixed. As it stands, it’s not acceptable.
---
I got stuck on the railway, outside the train, due to a bug that many people have reported. I tried reloading the last chapter, but “City Outskirts” chapter is from hours earlier, and I can’t reload the last railway section anymore, even now that I know a fix was released. It’s not in my save slots, and the last chapter I can see is “Stadium Grounds,” which is from way earlier.
Well, I’m not going to replay the game. I only wanted to finish it and forget it, it only had about an hour left. It's so monotonous, repetitive, and boring that I can’t stand it. At the very least, it should have more combat action.

developer_response.body:
Hey there, thank you for leaving your feedback - this is very frustrating to hear and we're sorry you've encountered this blocker. The latest patch should address this issue, but you will probably have to restart the chapter 'The First Weakspot' and play it through. 

We understand that this is frustrating, but if you do want to give Reach another go, we'd love to hear from you again!

reviews.review_description:
Was enjoying this game for several hours. Had gotten just past the point you get the second drone. Went to continue my adventure this morning, but the game shows no saved data. It's all gone. Disappeared. There's no saved data under "Chapters" and there's no saved data under "Load Adventure." This is neither the experience I paid for, nor the one I want. 
Devs, how do I get my save data back?

Update 5/11/26: I reached out 3 times to ndreams, as requested. Haven't gotten any response. Crickets. I feel their offer to help was empty and performative. 
The game has many bugs, but an inability to save game data reliably is egregious. My experience with this game and the developer has been atrocious.

developer_response.body: Hey there, we're so sorry to hear this! Please reach out to us on discord.gg/ndreams or email us at support@ndreams.com and we'll try to help. This shouldn't have happened, so we'll do what we can. - Sean

reviews.review_description: Edited: I fell in love with this game, but there are a ton of bugs and options that should’ve been included. At the beginning of every new area you load into, the game acts as if Rosa is sprinting when walking. Following up on that, there should be an option that lets you decide whether or not you want to hear Rosa’s panting when she sprints. Also when you’re climbing, it automatically turns you when going around a corner, I myself find this extremely nauseating because I’m also turning using the joystick too and it gets mixed up. ALSO! You can see the terracore’s frozen model when you look behind you in one of the chase scenes you first time you meet. On the way to the second weak point, I was glitched onto the track and not into the pod. I tried restarting the game but it kept glitching…And lastly, THERE SHOULD BE SLIDING!!!!

developer_response.body: Hey there, thanks for leaving your feedback for us! It's noted. We're continuing to evaluate Reach going forward, so every comment helps. If you want to chat about the game or need to troubleshoot with us, head to discord.gg/ndreams

reviews.review_description: I loved the mechanics for movement and all of the story that’s happening!! The only thing that confused me is when i moved me hand back in real life while trying to just a gap in the game, it moved me backwards. But i fixed it in the settings so now its good. Overall, i haven’t finished the game yet or got to any big part, but its an amazing game for any one who likes action, puzzle solving(there’s some but not like Red Matter another game on vr),  parkour, and a grear story of what’s happening or what happened in the past. Also another thing that held me back was my stick drift, its not the games fault, but can someone send me a friend request and help me fix it please 🙏

reviews.review_title: STUCK ON THE TRACK AT CITY OUTSKIRTS
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game a lot. Super fun mechanics and a solid mix between puzzling and action. It's definitely still on the buggy side and there are a lot of glitchy bits that trip up the smooth experience, but overall I'm a fan.

developer_response.body:
Hey there! We're sorry to hear you've been stuck at a soft lock. Please try reloading from the last completed chapter you've played - this should resolve the issue. If it doesn't, please reach out to us on discord.gg/ndreams and we can help trouble shoot with you. 

Thank you for leaving a review for Reach, we're really happy to hear you've enjoyed the rest of the game! - Sean

reviews.review_title: I’ve been waiting a long time for this.
reviews.review_description: Honestly, I don’t understand the negative reviews. The game is an absolute gem. I hope they release more exceptional games like this a bit sooner.

developer_response.body: That's great to hear! Thank you for leaving a review for Reach, it's really appreciated by the team :D

reviews.review_title: Love the game, wish I could finish it.
reviews.review_description: Love the game, however there is a bug when you reach " the bridge " that will not let you complete that level. I have gone back and tried to play new several times and still no luck. Maybe there will be a fix at some point as I would love to finish the game.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we're sorry to hear that you've encountered  a blocker in Reach. Our latest patch from earlier this week should unlock this blocker for you! Once you've updated your app, please try restarting the chapter 'the first weakpoint' and play it through. You should find the issue resolved. 

Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

reviews.review_description: I really like it but there is some bugs like when you move the weapon starts bugging and the map not finished you can fall through ground it’s worth buying everything is with good quality and its a little bit scary

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for leaving a review for Reach. It'd be great to know what bugs you're encountering! We're constantly reviewing the game to improve it. If you'd like to, please message us on Discord (discord.gg/ndreams) and we can try to help resolve any issues you're having! - Sean

reviews.review_title: We need reach 2 to carry on story
reviews.review_description: It took me ages to get past the rail glitch, but i keep going back to the game and playing it. I just love the game and the way it finishes leaves it open to reach 2. Continuing the story i'd love to play the first game and go right to a second. But please no glitch i hope a second installment is not wishful thinking. Thank you for a great game.

The bugs are very-much still present as of patch 2. In fact, the very 1st time the game tried to load a new section for me it bugged out, took ages & was evident that it was playing sound but only showing me the loading screen.
Then there are the deaths for no reason, such as from suddenly being stuck in a wall in one of the many & rather tedious “pull yourself through” sections.
Or deaths which don’t trigger when they should, such as the old, “I’ve fallen down & am stuck but not fallen far enough to die”.
Which will happen in a “puzzling exploration” style game where the way forward is not always clear & there’s plenty to be found off the beaten path.
More than once I also got stuck badly enough to need a YouTube walkthrough to understand what to do next, which sucks, because mostly all it was was that I was missing a gameplay mechanic which hadn’t been explained at all - such as burning vines by shooting normal arrows through fire.
Where I gave up - the final nail for me - was shortly after getting the grapple drones & there’s a chase sequence. There’s a very finnicky part where you have to make several far grapples as a monster is chasing you and causing everything to fall apart. I tried about 10 times in a row to pull of a short series of grapples but found the grapples to be incredibly unreliable, or maybe the timing was too tight for me, but either way I couldn’t do it, so got frustrated and decided to give up - and share my honest experience and feedback in this review.
This is a $40 game. What with the bugs & negative experience outlined above, coupled with its rather short runtime (looks to be around 5 hours judging by YouTube walkthroughs) make 2 stars feel like a fair rating from me.
To put it into context - Behemoth costs around the same amount, plays similarly, was completable at launch, had a longer run time, better graphics, fewer bugs better gameplay mechanics and story - just way more content and all more fun. Plus they worked diligently to patch it and add content very quickly post-launch, so my review gives it 5 stars.
Judging on a similar scale, Reach deserves 2 stars.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we're very sorry to hear that you've not had the experience we intended for Reach. We've just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players. If you're willing to jump back in, we'd love to hear your thoughts after this patch! We appreciate that the game was not what you wanted on purchase, but we believe these fixes should resolve a lot of the problems you've detailed here. 

If you have continued issues, please message us on discord.gg/ndreams

reviews.review_description: Fun adventure game. Doesn't feel like a small experience.
The is full of bugs. You can get soft lock many times. I want a refund

developer_response.body:
Hey there, we're very to hear that you've encountered a soft lock that's blocked your progress. If you'd like us to help trouble shoot with you, please reach out to us on discord.gg/ndreams. 

Regarding refunds: all refund are dealt with by Meta - it's not something we can help with if you decide to request one. - Sean

reviews.review_description: I have absolutely loved this game, amazing graphic(best in my opinion) and gameplay. But the amount of bugs I have experienced has been ridiculous. Before I could deal with it but now im softlocked on the city outskirts level and spawn outside of the train. Really good game, but could tell they rushed its release.

developer_response.body:
Our latest patch from earlier this week should unlock this blocker for you! Once you've updated your app, please try restarting the chapter 'the first weakpoint' and play it through. You should find the issue resolved. 

Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

reviews.review_description:
I have just completed Reach. It was, overall, fantastic. I was worried that I might experience some bad bugs like others have reported, but thankfully it was mostly a great experience. 
There were a few bugs here and there but nothing serious. A couple of times, upon loading a new area, it crashed. When I re-opened the game it carried on from the right place with no problems. On a couple of other occasions, the loading screen didn't go away, although I could hear the sounds of the new level. Again, restarting the game solved this.
Apart from that, the issues were minor - finding myself buried in a wall etc, only a couple of times, but nothing more severe than I encounter in practically any other Quest game.
The vast majority of my time in the game was brilliant. The combat seemed dull at first, but as it developed with the introduction of new arrows and attacking variations it became great fun, allowing for a lot of experimentation. Similarly, the parkour became second nature, allowing for ever more exciting leaps.
The set pieces were many and wonderful! A really immersive, exciting, fun experience.
I found this to be one of those games that I lost track of time whilst playing, often having to come off only when my headset warned me that the battery was about to die.
I've not written a review before, but felt the need to due to the negative ones out there, which almost put me off buying the game (other games, I still haven't bought because the reviews are so scathing). 
I don't expect perfection from Quest games, I just want to enjoy my time. Reach definitely deserves a place in my "must play" titles, for the way it looks, feels, plays. The bottom line for me is: did I have a huge amount of fun playing it, and if I had my time again would I purchase it? A big fat yes! For me, it's up there with Arkham Shadow, Red Matter 1 and 2, Moss 1 and 2, Arizona Sunshine Remake (I haven't played the 2nd one, that's my next adventure!), Behemoth, Shadow Point, The Last Clockwinder, Assassins Creed Nexus and Shattered.
Not perfect but with more time and effort this game will be much better.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We're working to keep reviewing Reach to make it better for everyone, so we appreciate your thoughts for us. - Sean

reviews.review_description:
I am currently on the city outskirts chapter, and I am softlocks because the train is not putting me in it and I spawn on the tracks. If I try and move, I move once and then just slide. I have tried many many ways to get to the start of the level, but I can’t this game is really good and I really like it but I’m soft and I’d like to be able to still play so please read this immediately and fix it. i’m going to give a one star review until this is fixed once it is fixed, I will change it to a five star.

Update
Thank you for responding and helping me fix it, I will be updating this to a 5 star review. Thank you devs.

developer_response.body:
Hey CJ,

We're glad to hear that you think Reach is really good and that you're enjoying it so far outside of your current issue that you're having.

We will flag this to the team but one suggestion we have that has fixed this problem previously is using the chapter select option to restart the level and you should be able to complete the chapter with no issues.

If this does not resolve the issue, please join our Discord and we will be more than happy to assist.

discord.gg/ndreams

reviews.review_description: This game reminds me of horizon on PlayStation and to be completely honest. This game is super fun and good.￼ it literally shows you your body, which is actually good cause whenever you’re in an edge spot you could’ve looked down at your feet to see where you’re going not only that but there’s finger physics which not much game developers add and the story itself is just good. This has to win in the game awards cause this game is literally just the best and the weapons oh, don’t get me started with the weapons. The weapons are the best. This game is literally the best if you’re looking for a game that’s just like horizon and has finger physics and body scene this game is for you.

reviews.review_title: A good game with a few bugs
reviews.review_description: Most of the other reviews talk about the unresponsive Controls or the many bugs, maybe even the boring gameplay. But I’d say otherwise, sure the price tag is a little high (I’d say 30-25 dollars would be more fair) and the game may have its moments with unloaded areas or immense lag but you can’t expect much from a standalone quest headset, the thing struggles at the thought of an un-optimized game. Now that I’m done with the issues all I gotta say is, if you’re looking for a fast paced slightly story focused platformer (where you don’t control a small fella) I’d recommend this.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we've just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players. If you're willing to jump back in, we'd love to hear your thoughts after this patch! 

If you have continued issues, please message us on discord.gg/ndreams

reviews.review_title: Boring and annoying in equal parts
reviews.review_description: If you like spending a couple of hours climbing white drainpipes on featureless buildings then this game is for you. I've seen more combat at a church social. Supposedly it gets better later but, if so, why do we have to do this penance first?

developer_response.body: Hey there, thanks for leaving a review for Reach. We're sorry it's not the experience you were looking for. If you're willing to get through the opening/introduction section (which it seems like you're on) the combat element of the game comes into its own. Do let us know if you give it another shot!

reviews.review_title: Meta. Please do not allow for this
reviews.review_description:
I played only a few minutes before the first hard crash, closing the game.
What was the rush in releasing now? Why not wait for Xmas?
This is as bad a launch as Hitman VR.
It brings down the image of VR, gives the platform a bad reputation when these big games(wanderer as an example) are released unpolished and buggy.
Hitman VR eventually patched up to a playable state, and is on the Meta Quest a fun game. Hopefully Reach will as well.

Devs, fix your game!
Meta, please do your job better.

Update: The game is now Amazing after some updates.
Definitely worth the time!

I hate to be writing this. I absolutely love the mechanics and the gameplay. But I came across to many game breaking bugs and had to restart my game from the beginning several times. The last time I was on a train and spawned outside the train on the track and I can’t go anywhere. Super frustrating. I’m gonna put this game down and hope they fix this game soon and maybe I’ll come back to it because without the bugs this game would be incredibly amazing.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we're sorry to hear that you've encountered a blocker. Our latest patch from earlier this week should unlock this blocker for you! Once you've updated your app, please try restarting the chapter 'the first weakpoint' and play it through. You should find the issue resolved. 

Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

reviews.review_description: I'm loving the game so far. But whenever I try to jump onto my shield, the shield flies back at me mid-flight and I fall to my death. Am I the only one having a problem with this? Or am I just hitting the wrong Buttons, when I shouldn't be. Now I can't figure out the grappling drones. I just dropped to my death trying to grab on 2 one of those. I'm done.

developer_response.body: Hiya - sorry to hear that you've encountered some issues with Reach! Our latest patch this week has addressed a number of fixes to gameplay, which may have resolved your issue with the shield and grappling. If you continue to experience problems, please reach out to me on discord.gg/ndreams and I can help troubleshoot! - Sean

reviews.review_title: There is bug in the game
reviews.review_description: ​"Hello Support Team, I would like to report a bug in the game that is preventing me from progressing. Please help me resolve this issue.

developer_response.body: Updated response: we're just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players. If you're willing to jump back in, we'd love to hear your thoughts after this patch!

reviews.review_title: UPDATE: IT'S IMPOSSIBLE TO BEAT NOW
reviews.review_description: If you guys do this reach will become my favorite vr game. Add more interactables and make it so you can change the button to sprint like make it a different button or swing your arms to run because I hate stick drift and pressing on the joystick gets stick drift if you do this for the next patch then thank you and then I will rate this a 5 star anyway great game   more updates and then this game has a chance to be the best vr game but anyway the combat in this game is amazing with the weapons you get 8/10 and also the Parkour is amazing 9/10 for that it could be a 10/10 of they fixed the stick drift problem and it's also so cinematic overall 9/10 vr game imo the 3rd best vr game behind marvels iron man vr and Batman Arkham shadow which is impressive cause camouflaj is hard to beat but you beat all of the other games and I also love vr and is very picky about vr games and what they do so props to you guys Update: on the second city outskirts chapter you don't spawn on the train/tube thing you spawn on the railing and when you walk on it you slide and I read a review and your tip didnt work pls help me

reviews.review_description: This game has a pretty hefty price tag for it being quite janky. Everything from the movement mechanics to the combat all feels janky and not very polished. I'll admit the graphics are quite impressive and the whole game is very cinematic, but that's about it. I don't recommend buying it unless you want a purely cinematic experience in vr.

reviews.review_title: This is not ok plz fix game dev
reviews.review_description: You see when you are on the chapter say outskirts, right after getting the upgrade you get suck on the track and you can't move ro you fall if you fix this it will be 5/5

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Our latest patch from earlier this week should unlock this blocker for you! Once you've updated your app, please try restarting the chapter 'the first weakpoint' and play it through. You should find the issue resolved :D 

Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)
-

Hi there! Thank you for reporting this issue and we're sorry that your time with Reach has been impacted by this. The team are looking into a fix for several issues and we'll try to address this one. If you have more information on this or screenshot of the issues, we'd appreciate it if you could send it to us on discord.gg/ndreams!

reviews.review_title: A great game, with one major flaw.
reviews.review_description:
The game is a lot of fun, having taken some of the best part of Assassin's Creed and maybe a little from Stride. The parkour is smooth, intuitive and satisfying, and the VO and animation are great.

There is one serious flaw, however, that I hope will be fixed in the future: if you want to kneel in the game, you have to use the B button on your controller; physically kneeling is not an option. You know how there's always a part of the game's tutorial where you have to duck under some low-hanging debris or something to proceed and the game tells you what button to push to kneel? In most games, I ignore this instruction and just get down on my knees and proceed without issue. In this game it would not let me pass until I pressed the stupid button, even though my head was easily beneath the obstacle I was trying to crawl under. Like an invisible force field was holding me back. What's more, usually when you vault up to a higher surface, it forces you into an artificial crouch and you have to press the button to stand back up.

I THINK physically kneeling works in combat situations, for ducking shots or hiding behind cover to avoid detection. But even then, your arms appear to be coming down from above your head, where your shoulders would be if you were standing, so it's pretty immersion-breaking.

Don't get me wrong - being able to press a button to kneel for those who want or need it is a great feature to have. But when I'm in VR I want to physically embody my character as much as possible, and I don't think I'm alone in this. Please, devs, give us the option to use our actual knees!

Edit: Thank you for the response! I will definitely update my review if this is rectified.

developer_response.body:
Hey there, thanks for leaving such detailed feedback for us. We're sorry that, despite the fun you're having with other parts of the game, that kneeling options are an issue for you. 

That said, we'll pass this on to the team. We're planning an update for Quest soon that will bring QoL improvements, so we'll bring this to the team's attention. 

Thanks for taking the time again. If you encounter further issues, don't hesitate to email support@ndreams.com.

reviews.review_title: devs please read this! edit, 2nd part?
reviews.review_description: so whenever i go in the transport after fixing the first flaw in the entrapment it bugs out after loading me in a the next area and spawns me about 20 feet behind the transport so idk what to do... Otherwise the game is absolutely amazing.          edit thanks for the tip that worked. Edit pt 2: the second part should happen and you should have to rehabilitate the freed living robots, and a Second big bad comes in, idk.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

We're sorry to hear that you're experiencing this issue but we're glad to know that you think Reach is amazing!

We will give this feedback to the team and we really appreicate you for flagging this. A quick solution we would suggest right now is to use chapter select which should fix the issue the next time you load the game but if the issue persist join the Discord and we're more than happy to help :D

discord.gg/ndreams

reviews.review_description:
This game was amazing! Non stop action from start to finish. Looked great, ran great, was long, cute story, fun finding the upgrades and collectables. I came across one bug that other people had mentioned. The one where you spawn on the rail track towards the end of the game. I just closed it out and started from the beginning of the chapter and it was fine. I don't think I've played a quest game that doesn't have at least 1 glitch. Usually many more. Sometimes I think it has more to do with the headset than the game. I decided I was going to quit buying $40-$50 games unless they had a free trail or until they went on sale due to several previous disappointments. I got this one 2 days ago on sale for $27. After playing I would have gladly paid the $40. I love VR and spend alot of time playing and have bought almost every game that is single user. I love campaigns. This is very good one. 
Just for the record, I am playing on the 3s.

reviews.review_title: I hate to write a bad review
reviews.review_description: Amazing fun game, then I got to the generators and the game glitched. The cut scene didn’t play and even though the little drone stares at the door, said door is not interactable. And since the chapter menu is crap, the nearest save I could go was near the beginning of the game so I opted for uninstalling, hoping I may want to replay the whole game from the start in the near future. Which I usually don’t. Sad cause it was probably my 1st pick for best 2025 game but… NO!

developer_response.body:
Hey there. Thank you for leaving such detailed feedback after our patches - we're sorry that you've had a frustrating time. We've just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players. This includes fixes to multiple progression blockers among other things. If your willing to replay the game, you should find many of the issues you've encountered are now resolved! 

We'd love to hear your feedback after this latest patch. Do let us know how you get on! - Sean

reviews.review_title: One of the best I have played!
reviews.review_description:
I was really worried going into this game because of all the reviews talking about bugs. I did run into one that kind of soft locked the game when i was teleporting via train (it spawned me on the track instead of inside the train), but the game let's you replay from new chapters so i was only out about 45 mins of gameplay. Also, the game allows you to save user determined backup saves, so if there is a tough part that you finish or you are about to ride the train, it might be a good time to add a backup save. Other than that one bug, i didn't have any issues.

I did have slight motion sickness  at the start, but soon got accustomed to it, with the exception of 3 or 4 somewhat short spinning sections later in the game that are requirred to complete.

The voice acting is great, the story was much more interesting than I expected, but it's the tomb raider/captain america/spider-man traversal and combat that really sells the game. You feel like a super hero and it is a lot of fun. Plus, it has one of the most satisfyingly fun finales that i have experienced in VR. Don't pass on this one.

First off, let me say that I absolutely love this game. That said, there are several glitches throughout the game, such as when transitioning from one section of the game to another, it fades out of black and you’re in the middle of the air falling to your death. Up until now after many hours of playing the game, I’ve been able to reload and it moves past the glitch. However, I’m at a spot after fixing the first entrapment generator thing and after getting on the tram to return to the city, it dumps me out on the track and I can see the tramway in the distance at the next stop. When I try to walk along the track to get back to the tram, I am variably fall off the track every time to my death. One time I managed to make it all the way back to the tram, but it didn’t let me jump off the track and again fault my death every time. I have tried to reload the game, restarted everything to no avail. Whenever it starts up again, I am stuck on the track. There doesn’t seem to be any way out of this glitch and now I can’t finish the game and I’m so close. I’ve invested hours and hours of time in this game and it’s very disappointing to not be able to finish it. Developers, is there any way around this or do I just have to ditch the game?￼

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Our latest patch from earlier this week should unlock this blocker for you! Once you've updated your app, please try restarting the chapter 'the first weakpoint' and play it through. You should find the issue resolved. 

Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

reviews.review_description:
I bought this after patch 2.

There are still many bugs and much jank. I only came across one major game breaking bug, but I managed to resolve it by going to the chapter select so I was able to reach the end. You should be able to pull through to the end without completely giving up, but there will be bugs along the way.

Overall, the game is absolutely amazing! The parkour is enough to justify buying it as it works great. It's not perfect, but it's better than AC Nexus. 

I also thought the combat was really good myself. The bow and arrow feel real, and I was pulling the arrow to my face like you would IRL, so it felt very intuitive. The only thing that was a bit off was the gunplay because of the way you hold the weapons but other then that I thought the combat was good and it isn't rare at all to come across I thought it was littered appropriately throughout the game

The game competes with the likes of Batman and Metro it's that good true AAA quality It's just a shame that the devs released it in this state with this much jank and this many bugs. But if you can get through all that then behind it all is a contender for the game of the year!

developer_response.body:
Updated response: we've just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players - including gameplay smoothness and QoL updates. If you're willing to jump back in, we'd love to hear your thoughts after this patch! 

If you have continued issues, please message us on discord.gg/ndreams

reviews.review_title: The buggiest game of all time
reviews.review_description: Was really enjoying this game, great graphics and gameplay. I've lost count on how many times I've had to restart levels and the game just randomly shuts down. I am over halfway through the game when the grappling hook just stopped working on the one Green Bar that I need to continue when I went to rest the level it sent me back over one hour of gameplay. Not sure if I could be bothered to continue with it. Very frustrating.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we're sorry to hear you've had a frustrating time with Reach. We've just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players. If you're willing to jump back in, we'd love to hear your thoughts after this patch! 

If you have continued issues, please message us on discord.gg/ndreams

reviews.review_title: Love this game… a must buy!😁
reviews.review_description: Love the game! I have really enjoyed it! It is absolutely amazing and I hope the devs have more to come! I did have a bit of an issue. The devs responded quickly and their patch fixed it.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thank you so much for playing Reach and we greatly apologise for the issue that you're running into. We are looking into this but a current solution that we have is using the Chapter Select feature to reset from a previous level and going through this level should work after. We understand this is not ideal but this is the best way to get you enjoying Reach as quickly as we can :smile:

Let us know if this works or if you have any further questions.

reviews.review_description:
The first level of this game is amazing. Wish it was all like that. However it is pretty fun, the graphics are exceptional and the gameplay is enjoyable if a little repetitive. 

It's a bit like the climb with bow and arrows!

Annoyingly I got towards the end (start of return to the city level before the second entrapment) and the game crashed. I was able to restart at the end of the last level and this time I appeared on the tracks with the docking train some way ahead. I tried several times to walk down the track but couldn't so I guess that's the end of the game for me unless they fix it.

developer_response.body:
EDIT: Hey there, thank you for leaving your feedback - this is very frustrating to hear and we're sorry you've encountered this blocker. We've just released our latest patch that addresses a whole host of issues, including a fix for the city outskirts blocker. 

If you're happy to give Reach another go, please update the app and try restarting the chapter you're in. This should resolve the issue and allow you to progress. Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

Hi there,

We're very sorry you are experiencing this! We have seen that this level can be resolved using the chapter select feature. If it doesn't, please join the Discord and we are happy to help: discord.gg/ndreams

reviews.review_description: only problem i have is the game breaking glitch that happens after you fix the first weakpoint and ride the tram back and when he asked what made you do it the tram jumps forward to when it stops and you're stuck on the rails tried reloading tried restarting the game doesn't fix it but still good game

reviews.review_title: Love this game definitely should buy
reviews.review_description: ￼ This game has so much action in it. I got explosions in the city. I got like there was a lot of action. I fell off of stuff in this big monster came after me and I slipped off of this edge don’t listen to the people that say it’s a one star

Let me start off by saying that the graphics are absolutely incredible. The physics? Smoother than butter. But the one problem I have? The flaming arrows. You see, the idea was good, and so was the execution. But the instructions could have SPECIFIED how the flaming arrows were done. Would've been 5 stars if not for some of the instructions. REACH ON TOP!

reviews.review_title: Couldn't finish - too difficult for me
reviews.review_description: It's an amazing game with fantastic graphics. I loved the puzzle aspact of it and working out how to get around. But I really struggled with the grapple drones at first and nearly gave up altogether when trying to cross a crumbling landscape where I needed to keep grappling onto distant poles. Must have taken 200 attempts to get through that bit. But I'm glad I persevered and I made it through to the stadium where sadly I have had to abandon the game because I just cannot get through all the enemies attacking me. I don't enjoy fighting games and in this one you need to battle against ever more challenging swarms of enemies to progress. You can't just hide and stealthily avoid them. I am useless at it and after around 50 attempts to beat this section at the Stadium I have given up. What a great shame because I enjoyed it.
The mechanics are so buggy and finicky that it’s just not fun to play.

reviews.review_description:
Okay so I just bought the game, have played it for 30 minutes and I love the movement it's great the graphics are amazing but I absolutely hate the bow because when I try aiming it doesn't shoot straight and I also got a big that kicked me out of the game but I feel like it could be a lot of fun and I will write a second receive when I finish the game.




Update: do not listen to bad reviews at first it was boring but as you progress the game just gets better and better honestly I do understand that there are bad reviews cause there are some bugs but it is honestly not that bad you just have to restart the game so it is not that bad. And I really like the stun arrows cause you can steal the enemies gun which is SICK!, GOOD GAME

developer_response.body: Hey thank you for re-reviewing our game! If you'd be happy to, please consider updating your score! We're happy you've enjoyed your experience with Reach.

reviews.review_description:
Was really enjoying the game.  Unfortunately, hit a game breaking bug.  Jumped on the rail at one point and now can't progress because the trian car never showed up.  I've played for many hours, and I'm not sure how I avoid completely starting over.

Update: Patch didn't address my issue, so I'm forced to start over.  

After starting over, hit multiple issues.  Eventually, I hit one I was unable to bypass.  Ended up watching the ending in a YouTube walk-through.   I'm disappointed because the game itself is fun if it wasn't riddled with optimisation issues and game breaking bugs.

developer_response.body:
Hey there, thank you for leaving your feedback - this is very frustrating to hear and we're sorry you've encountered this blocker. We've just released our latest patch that addresses a whole host of issues, including the one you're detailing here. 

If you're happy to give Reach another go, please update the app and try restarting the chapter you're in. This should resolve the issue and allow you to progress. Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

reviews.review_description:
Don't listen to the bad reviews cause this game is GREAT! I have only played for 2 hours so far and am loving EVERY second of it!!
It just keeps getting better and better! Easily my favorite game of the year so far and that includes Batman and Of Lies and Rain and quite a few others that are actual games. This is a full game with pretty dang good graphics and such a cool story and fun af mechanics and the parkouring is next level good! I love the hidden upgrades and it all just looks and feels so cool! Haven't played such a good, full-length game since Asgard's Wrath 2. Will update my review once I beat it with gameplay time
Update:beat it in 5 days which to me is a pretty good run time lol It was just amazing and while it did crash on me like 3 times it was mainly smooth af and SUCH a good story

I have played around one third or half of the game. It is a fantastic solo adventure mixed with platformer puzzles and action. Every thing is introduced gradually.  It is perfect to play in little chunk. At this moment I did not find any bugs and the play is smooth with nice grafics. In summary a wonderful experience to play.

I was really enjoying Reach. Good story and fun gameplay but unfortunately about 25 mins from the end when I was on the monorail the game bugged and threw me outside of it. Then every time it loaded it did the same
When I went into the chapter load it sent me back so far that I just gave up and now I've had to watch the end of the game on YouTube.
 A real shame. One be one to look at Devs.

Cheers

developer_response.body:
Hiya - sorry to hear this. If you're willing to jump back in, our latest patch from earlier this week should unlock this blocker for you! Once you've updated your app, please try restarting the chapter 'the first weakpoint' and play it through. You should find the issue resolved. 

Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

reviews.review_description:
Update:
Finished the game. I absolutely loved this game. The story, the character, the graphics, the mechanics, the soundtrack. It’s a very high production game. 

That being said, if it ran smoothly, like say…Arken Age, Batman, and others, it would be infinitely better. The frame rate can get very choppy throughout the game. 

I am still amazed that this was achieved on the Quest platform, and it makes me excited about what’s next as far as a Quest headset. 

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️


Patch Update: 
Just jumped in to check out new new patch release. Everything feels so smooth now. Love it. Compliments to the devs on a great first patch 👍🏻👍🏻


This isn’t a review, more of a first impression. I just played the first act up until the city imploded. What I have seen so far is not without flaws, but holy crap…it’s a lot of fun! The graphics are pretty good, the audio is solid, the narration is a nice touch…And the game teaches you the controls as you need them. 

There’s some jank, which seems to be the norm these days with Quest 3 games. Hopefully the devs will work on that. 

It uses Application SpaceWarp which you can see sometimes. I think that also contributes to the sometimes choppy framerate. Don’t let that discourage you from playing this though. This needs to be played. 

I did watch GamertagVR’s video review and was pretty disappointed and wasn’t going to buy. But every other review I looked at was positive, so I made the decision to purchase. 

Maybe I’ll see some of the game breaking problems that Gamertag had, later in the game, but I hope not. 

Until I get to that point, this game rocks 👊🏻

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thank you so much for playing Reach and we're very glad to hear you enjoyed it! We also appreciate you giving Reach another go after the updates.

We've taken onboard your feedback and will keep it in mind moving forward <3

reviews.review_title: Best VR game, also full of bugs
reviews.review_description: This is the best VR game I've played. It is incredibly immersive and fun to do the climbing and other physics it has. I've played it for many many hours. Unfortunately it does have a lot of glitches. Frequently when clearing one stage and going to another the screen goes black and never comes back. The audio for the next stage begins but I can't see or do anything. Once it glitched and I would endlessly fall, die and then revive falling again underneath an elevator. Sometimes it just crashes and I have to load the game again. Once I got my hand stuck on a wall trying to shimmy through a crack and the game would not let me let go so I had to quit. The most frequent bug I've experienced is when clearing a level or scene and the new scene never loading.

developer_response.body:
Hey there. Thank you for leaving such detailed feedback after our patches - we appreciate your willingness to revisit the game several times. We've just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players. This includes fixes to multiple progression blockers and gameplay bugs among other things. 

We'd love to hear your feedback after this latest patch. Do let us know how you get on! - Sean

reviews.review_description: Is it rough around the edges? sometimes. I got probably 7 or 8 glitches and some stuttering. Otherwise fantastic adventure. If you like VR Parkour and parkour combat you'll love this game like me

So much explosions and action! And a lot of running around, jumping, and climb walls like you’re parkouring while being Shot at by a helicopter! The graphics are a bit disappointing so far. Not bad but just not what I expected for a game at this price. At first, I thought I bought the wrong game cuz you start in a city as a stunt double agent shooting “bad guys” with a fantasy looking bow and arrow while they have guns lol. There’s something about the bow that doesn”t “feel” right. The drawing of the string inst as intuitive as it is in skydance’s behemoth. Bit of a learning curve where you have to be in running motion to jump. Cant just jump whenever you want which is weird. But otherwise an intense action packed game so far and looking forward to diving into it more!

This is a great game. Parkour and combat are dynamic and are done great; only I would second the suggestion to use physical crouch as an alternative to pressing the crouch button.

The game has an actual story with some parallels in the real world and emotional substance, narrated as dialogues between the protagonist and other characters, and it doesn't interrupt the gameplay.

There are a few bugs—for example, I was able to obtain a power crystal 3 times from the same place, rendering two parts of a level unnecessary to finish; sometimes narration stops and never triggers again, and sometimes it repeats. Nothing critical, but a few times I was forced to restart a map because of glitches.

Also, thank you for the female protagonist! She is cool and relatable.

However, I must say that the first part (before the Fall, if I may say so) looks and feels in some sense better—because of the setting. Vast spaces and buildings of inhuman proportions feel quite alien and barebones. It looks good in art pieces as seen in-game media gallery, but in VR it's just not as impressive. I understand that narrow modern European streets would make this game too similar in setting to AC, so I'm not sure what I would propose—given technical limitations (AC is awful with its motion reprojection). *_*

Was really enjoying the game, as it has some truly fantastic art direction (visuals, style, music score) but unfortunately there are so many glitches with gameplay mechanics. Reached a point where it became impossible to proceed any further (in a scene transition, somehow it dropped me in a random space, basically falling to death over and over in an endless loop). The previous save point failed, but ultimately I figured out how to load the previous chapter. So at least I didn't have to start the game over from the beginning (as some other reviews have reported)

developer_response.body:
Hey there. Thank you for leaving such detailed feedback after our patches - we're sorry to hear  you've had a frustrating time. We've just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players. This includes fixes to multiple progression blockers among other things.  Please try reloading the chapter you are in after updating your Reach app - this should resolve the issue. 

We'd love to hear your feedback after this latest patch. Do let us know how you get on! - Sean

reviews.review_description: My game is stuck I'm stuck in the railing of the city out skirts when you have to get to the elevator and then I keep falling off because I was not inside of the vehicle so the vehicle has glitched forward and I'm now stuck in infinite death loop

developer_response.body:
Updated reply: Hey there, thank you for leaving your feedback - this is very frustrating to hear and we're sorry you've encountered this blocker. We've just released our latest patch that address a whole host of issues, including a fix for the city outskirts blocker. 

If you're happy to give Reach another go, please update the app and try restarting the chapter you're in. This should resolve the issue and allow you to progress. Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

reviews.review_description: This game is unplayable the controls are so bad and unresponsive that it makes any of the climbing events impossible and useless. Any quick time events that rely on climbing or controller feedback is immediately ruined by how horrible the controls are. The game would be great if you wouldn’t fall all the time. I would get a full refund for this half cooked game if I wasn’t over my play time. I have tried and tried to make this game work. And no it’s not a skill level problem  it’s a lazy design problem. The game is fun until it become unplayable. Don’t be fooled like I was with the opening of this game it get very boring fast.

developer_response.body: Update reply: We've just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players. This includes fixes to multiple progression blockers and gameplay issues. We'd love to hear your thoughts after playing again!

reviews.review_description: don't get me wrong. if anyone asks me if they should get the game, i'd say yes in a heartbeat. problem is the major bug after you fix the first weak point on the tram. it just doesn't put the player in the car and i haven't found a way to fix it. i can't progress and i really do wanna finish the game. if that gets fixed, 9/10 game

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Our latest patch from earlier this week should unlock this blocker for you! Once you've updated your app, please try restarting the chapter 'the first weakpoint' and play it through. You should find the issue resolved :D 

Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

reviews.review_description:
Few hours in & I am having an absolute blast with this game ... 
Hand on my heart I cannot for the life of me understand the hate mainly by so called content creators ...🤷 Are they playing the same game as me or are they throwing there dummy's out of the pram coz they didn't get a free key ...??.. Whatever the reason it's a fantastic game ..see for yourself & if u don't like ...refund ...no harm no foul 

Reminds me so much of early 2d plaformers from zx spectrum days to Amiga days ...manic miner to prince of persia (og) Running jumping ...solving puzzles ..climbing etc etc .. how I dreamed games would become ☺️

No game is perfect & the odd tiny issue has popped up & Devs are aware no doubt

Loving it so far Devs 

Very sad seeing so many obviously FAKE one star reviews bringing down it's score ..ppl really do need to get lives & shame on the so called lovers of VR who supposedly create content ... Pathetic 

Cheers 🍻

reviews.review_title: One of the most joyful experiences
reviews.review_description: I just finished Reach recently and I just wanted to say that this game is one of the most fun experiences I've had in VR. As someone who enjoyed the climbing in  Assassins Creed VR, this really takes it to the next level. There is something so similar to Metroid baked into the DNA of this game. I would love to see them take on a full proper metroidvania style game. I will absolutely buy whatever this company makes next. Only complaint was the the main character breathing sound effect got a little too much.

This game is in early access so it’s a little jank, but it is AMAZING if you just trust it and go with it for a little bit, it and action packed and fun the parkour is also really cool, the combat is… alright but tearing out robots spines from behind just feels good, and it runs really smoothly too, I would recommend. 10/10 but it’s also not a great game if you get motion sick, I still love it tho.

reviews.review_title: Very fun game but has a lot of bugs
reviews.review_description: Reach is a really fun vr game with lots of fun mechanics but I find myself encountering a lot of bugs such as invisible barriers, some levels don’t save the progress you’ve completed, and there  are some ￼very buggy parts. But besides that the game is really fun and has a lot of fun movement mechanics and weapon mechanics. But the devs really need to fix a lot of bugs and this game will be perfect and if they do fix most of these bugs this will be my #1 recommend.

I'm about halfway through the game so far, and I really enjoy it. It's got great visuals, fun mechanics, a great introduction to multiple enemy types where you slowly get to meet each, amazing storytelling, and an organic highlight to your path where the paint or pathway isn't just screaming at you to come this way. Still, it lets you find it naturally and lets you explore. However, my main issue is the number of bugs/glitches in the game. Doors not opening, grappling not always coming, I phase through stuff, etc. Sometimes I have to restart the chapter multiple times. I can see how amazing this game will be once those bugs are gone, and thats why I keep playing it and why I give it a 4 till the bugs are fixed.

developer_response.body:
Hey there. Thank you for leaving such detailed feedback - and we appreciate your willingness to revisit the game. We've just dropped our latest patch this week, which resolves a whole host of issues reported by our players. This includes fixes to multiple progression blockers among other things. Once your Reach app is updated, try reloading and playing the current chapter you're in. You should find issues to be resolved now. 

We'd love to hear your feedback after this latest patch. Do let us know how you get on! - Sean

reviews.review_description: Finally finished reach after a glitch the developers patched. For the it is the best game in VR history. Truly a 10 out of 10 masterpiece. Thank you

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

We're sorry you're experiencing this issue! We have flagged this to the team but we have found that using the Chapter Select feature has resolved this issue. We understand this is not ideal but this is the quickest way to get you continuing your progress right now.

If you have anymore questions, please join our Discord: discord.gg/ndreams

reviews.review_title: Great game but with a frustrating bug
reviews.review_description: I am on the city outskirts mission but I spawn and I am stuck on the train tracks and i don’t want to replay the whole game so is there any other way to fix this

developer_response.body:
UPDATED RESPONSE: Hey there, thank you for leaving your feedback - this is very frustrating to hear and we're sorry you've encountered this blocker. We've just released our latest patch that addresses a whole host of issues, including a fix for the city outskirts blocker. 

If you're happy to give Reach another go, please update the app and try restarting the chapter you're in. This should resolve the issue and allow you to progress. Please let me know if you continue to experience this or any other issue after this update in our Discord server (discord.gg/ndreams) - I'm always happy to help troubleshoot! (Sean)

-

Hi there,

We are glad to hear that you think Reach is great but are unfortunately running into issues on the rail tracks. We have reported this to the team but the current best solution we can suggest is using the Chapter Select feature to restart from the previous level which has fixed the rail track issue for the majority of the users.

We hope this helps, if you have any further questions join our Discord and we're more than happy to help :D

discord.gg/ndreams

reviews.review_description:
This game is incredible..it looks stunning,the parkour side of it just flows so brilliantly..im 3 hours in and not one glitch or jank..

Is this game of the year.?..
It's my game of the decade..

I've played all the top quest games out there, and yes,it's better than batman..

This game had a tough launch and they were punished for, but it’s actually so much better than most, it really superb. I have so many VR games (about 150+) and this one is one of the good ones, the movement and climbing is maybe the best of all, the story is enjoyable. I would usually take stars off for not making it crossbuy, which I’m really disappointed about, but it doesn’t deserve less than 5.
I wasn't expecting this game to be so good the story was pretty good and the gameplay is the best definitely recommend for people that want a good story VR game
